{% extends "base.html" %} {% block title %}{{ section.title }} - Cano Documentation{% endblock title %} {% block description %}{{ section.description | default(value=config.description) }}{% endblock description %} {% block og_title %}{{ section.title }} - Cano Documentation{% endblock og_title %} {% block og_description %}{{ section.description | default(value=config.description) }}{% endblock og_description %} {% block content %} {{ section.content | safe }} {% endblock content %}
